'''gagopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iguanian|iguanian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iguanian|iguanian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gagopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gægepeth|gægepeth]] || [[word:gægepej|gægepej]] || [[word:gægepesh|gægepesh]] || [[word:gægepe|gægepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gagogopoth|gagogopoth]] || [[word:gagogopoj|gagogopoj]] || [[word:gagogoposh|gagogoposh]] || [[word:gagogopo|gagogopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gagopoth|gagopoth]] || [[word:gagopoj|gagopoj]] || [[word:gagoposh|gagoposh]] || [[word:gagopo|gagopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gagofpoth|gagofpoth]] || [[word:gagofpoj|gagofpoj]] || [[word:gagofposh|gagofposh]] || [[word:gagofpof|gagofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gagopotho|gagopotho]] || [[word:gagopojo|gagopojo]] || [[word:gagoposho|gagoposho]] || [[word:gagopoko|gagopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gagopoth|gagopoth]] || [[word:gagopoj|gagopoj]] || [[word:gagoposh|gagoposh]] || [[word:gagopo|gagopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gagopothol|gagopothol]] || [[word:gagopojol|gagopojol]] || [[word:gagoposhol|gagoposhol]] || [[word:gagopokol|gagopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gagopothotho|gagopothotho]] || [[word:gagopojojo|gagopojojo]] || [[word:gagoposhosho|gagoposhosho]] || [[word:gagopoko|gagopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gagopothon|gagopothon]] || [[word:gagopojon|gagopojon]] || [[word:gagoposhon|gagoposhon]] || [[word:gagopokon|gagopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gagopothoro|gagopothoro]] || [[word:gagopojoro|gagopojoro]] || [[word:gagoposhoro|gagoposhoro]] || [[word:gagopokoro|gagopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
